title: Docs: README.md, README-ru.md, .env.example
description:
Update documentation in both languages so users know how to use per-account proxy.

## Files
- README.md (Chinese — original, for upstream)
- README-ru.md (Russian — our fork)
- .env.example

## Content to add
- Section explaining per-account proxy: what it does, why use it
- Env format example showing both old and new pipe-extended syntax
- data.json schema example showing proxy field
- Priority order: account.proxy > PROXY_URL > none
- Note that masking is not applied (local single-user context)

## Acceptance criteria
- README.md updated with section in Chinese
- README-ru.md updated with section in Russian
- .env.example documents that PROXY_URL acts as fallback when account-level proxy is not set
- Both READMEs stay in sync (same sections present in both)

title: Dashboard UI: proxy field in add/edit form + table column
description:
Add the proxy field to the dashboard so users can manage per-account proxies through the web UI.

## Files
- public/src/views/dashboard.vue — add proxy input to add-account and edit-account forms; add column in accounts table
- public/src/locales/ru.json — Russian strings
- public/src/locales/zh.json — Chinese strings

## Acceptance criteria
- Add-account form has a Proxy URL (optional) text input
- Edit-account form shows current proxy and allows updating/clearing
- Accounts table has a Proxy column showing the URL with truncation and tooltip on overflow
- Empty proxy displays as a dash or em-dash, not 'null' or empty cell
- All new strings translated in both ru.json and zh.json
- No regression in existing dashboard behavior

## Out of scope
- Bulk proxy assignment
- URL format validation

title: Admin API: accept proxy in account add/edit endpoints
description:
Extend admin endpoints that create or update accounts to accept and persist the proxy field.

## Files
- src/controllers/account*.js (whichever handles add/edit)
- src/routes/* if route definitions need updating

## Acceptance criteria
- POST add-account accepts optional proxy string, persists via dataPersistence
- Edit-account endpoint accepts proxy update (including clearing it to null)
- GET accounts list returns proxy field as plain text (single-user local context, masking not required)
- When proxy is updated, the per-URL agent cache is invalidated for the old URL

comments.author: weselow
comments.text: Implementation complete. Files: src/utils/account.js (+addAccount/addAccountWithToken proxy param, +updateAccountProxy method with old-URL invalidate), src/utils/setting.js (saveAccounts proxy param), src/routes/accounts.js (proxy in GET response, optional proxy in POST /setAccount, new POST /updateAccountProxy).

title: Backend wiring: thread account through outgoing call sites
description:
Pass the selected account into every outgoing axios/fetch builder so per-account proxy applies to all upstream traffic.

## Files
- src/utils/request.js
- src/utils/upload.js
- src/utils/token-manager.js
- src/utils/cli.manager.js
- src/controllers/chat.image.video.js
- src/controllers/cli.chat.js
- src/models/models-map.js

## Approach
- Update applyProxyToAxiosConfig and applyProxyToFetchOptions signatures to accept account
- At each call site, replace the unparameterized proxy lookup with the account-aware one
- Where account is not currently in scope (e.g. models-map.js getLatestModels), thread it from accountManager.getCurrentAccount() or equivalent

## Acceptance criteria
- Every outgoing axios/fetch in the listed files uses the account's proxy when set
- Round-robin / least-used account selection logic stays untouched
- Token refresh flows (token-manager.js) honor the account's own proxy
- CLI flow continues to work end-to-end with proxy applied
close_reason: Implemented in branch bd-Qwen2API-rxi.1; awaiting epic completion before merge to production

comments.author: weselow
comments.text: Completed: 13 outbound call sites in 7 files migrated to per-account proxy via new accountManager.getAccount() / getAccountByToken() helpers. Backend functionally ready for end-to-end test (set proxy in data.json, restart, verify with valid + invalid proxy).

title: Backend core: proxy field in schema + per-URL agent cache
description:
Foundation for per-account proxy: extend account schema and refactor proxy-helper.js from singleton to per-URL agent cache.

## Files
- src/utils/data-persistence.js — env parser (_loadFromEnv) and file save/load: support proxy field
- src/utils/proxy-helper.js — replace proxyAgentInstance singleton with Map<url, HttpsProxyAgent>; add getProxyAgent(account); add resolveProxyUrl(account) returning account.proxy || config.proxyUrl || null; add invalidateProxyAgent(url) for explicit cleanup

## Env format (backward compatible)
- Old: email:password,email:password — still works (proxy = null)
- New: email:password|proxy_url,email:password — pipe separator extends with proxy

## Acceptance criteria
- data.json round-trip preserves proxy field (string or null)
- Old ACCOUNTS env value parses unchanged
- New ACCOUNTS env value with pipe parses proxy correctly
- getProxyAgent(account) returns agent for account.proxy if set, falls back to global PROXY_URL, else returns undefined
- Same URL across accounts → single shared agent in cache
- invalidateProxyAgent(url) removes from map and destroys sockets
notes: В ходе работы выяснилось, что src/utils/redis.js хардкодит поля аккаунта в setAccount и getAllAccounts — без правки proxy не сохранялся бы в Redis-режиме. Добавлен в scope беды (3-й файл вместо 2).
close_reason: Implemented in branch bd-Qwen2API-rxi.1; awaiting epic completion before merge to production

comments.author: weselow
comments.text: LEARNED: Redis storage mode in src/utils/redis.js explicitly destructures {password, token, expires} in setAccount and reconstructs the same fields in getAllAccounts — adding a new account field requires touching both methods or it silently disappears in Redis mode. Future field additions should grep for setAccount AND getAllAccounts simultaneously.

comments.author: weselow
comments.text: Completed: schema (file/env/redis), per-URL agent cache, resolveProxyUrl helper, invalidateProxyAgent. Call sites untouched (kept backward-compatible signatures), migrated in bead rxi.2.

title: Per-account proxy support
description:
Add per-account proxy configuration so each Qwen account in the rotation can route its outgoing traffic through its own HTTP/HTTPS/SOCKS5 proxy.

## Why
Currently all outgoing traffic shares one IP (host or single PROXY_URL). Anti-fraud at chat.qwen.ai may correlate accounts by IP and ban them in bulk. Confirmed worth implementing by upstream maintainer Rfym21 in https://github.com/Rfym21/Qwen2API/issues/103.

## Scope
- Backend: extend account schema, refactor proxy-helper to per-URL agent cache, thread account through outgoing call sites, accept proxy in admin API
- Frontend: proxy field in dashboard add/edit form + table column + i18n
- Docs: README.md (zh), README-ru.md (ru), .env.example

## Approach
- Single feature branch: feature/per-account-proxy
- One atomic PR to upstream Rfym21/Qwen2API at the end
- Backward compat: env format email:password keeps working; new format email:password|proxy_url adds proxy
- Priority order: account.proxy > PROXY_URL env > no proxy

## Out of scope (this epic)
- Bulk proxy assignment in UI
- Proxy URL validation regex
- Masking proxy in API responses (single-user local context)

title: Конфиги: английские комментарии

title: Dashboard UI: vue-i18n + перевод на русский
description: 1. Установить vue-i18n@9 в public/. 2. Создать locales/zh.json и locales/ru.json (~100 строк). 3. Настроить i18n в main.js (locale: ru, fallback: zh). 4. Заменить захардкоженные строки на t() в auth.vue, dashboard.vue, settings.vue. 5. Добавить переключатель языка ru/zh. 6. npm run build без ошибок.
close_reason: All requirements met: vue-i18n configured, ~100 strings translated, language switcher added, build passes

comments.author: weselow
comments.text: Completed: vue-i18n@9 installed, locales/ru.json + zh.json created (~100 strings each), all 3 views (auth/dashboard/settings) converted to t() calls, language switcher added in settings header, locale persisted in localStorage. Build passes.

title: i18n: Русификация проекта
description: Три направления: 1) Dashboard UI — vue-i18n, ~100 строк, переключатель языка. 2) README.md — создать README-ru.md, ссылка в оригинале. 3) Конфиги — английские дубликаты комментариев в .env.example и docker-compose*.yml
